feed.title: 潘华波律师事务所
feed.subtitle: 支持接各种民事，行政案件。 支持各种法律业务咨询。
feed.rights: All rights reserved 2025, 潘华波律师事务所

entry.title: 潘华波律师事务所-工作简要
entry.content:
岗位职责：

1、根据公司法律金融业务
工作需要及工作安排，负责起草公司法律、合规工作相关文件以及管理制度的制定；
In accordance with the work requirements and arrangements of the company's legal and financial business, be responsible for drafting relevant documents related to the company's legal and compliance work and formulating management systems.

2、依据国家法律、法规和相关规章规定，根据相关业务部门及相关项目组的需求，并提供咨询意见，为工作顺利推进提供法律咨询保障；
Based on national laws, regulations and relevant regulations, provide consulting opinions according to the needs of relevant business departments and relevant project teams, and provide legal consultation guarantee for the smooth progress of work.

3、参与金融项目审查，审核交易合同、协议、意向书、备忘录、授权书等相关法律文件；
Participate in the review of financial projects and examine relevant legal documents such as transaction contracts, agreements, letters of intent, memorandums, powers of attorney, etc.

4、根据公司被诉案件的需要，完成起诉书、答辩状、代理词等法律文书的起草等事项；
According to the needs of the company's litigated cases, complete the drafting of legal documents such as indictments, pleadings, and representation statements.

5、协调相关金融业务部门和律师在进行证据收集、案情分析的基础上，为最大限度维护公司诉讼利益提供保
障；
Coordinate relevant financial business departments and lawyers to collect evidence and analyze the case situation, so as to provide guarantee for maximizing the company's litigation interests.

任职要求：(非必要查看)

1、本科及以上学历，拥有《法律职业资格证书》和《律师执业证》；
2、具有公道正派的品质和良好的职业道德。
3、具有较强的协调沟通能力、文字综合能力和分析能力；
4、具有公道正派的品质和良好的职业道德。精通与公司业务有关的法律知识，具有律师资格，有律师事务所工作经验者优先考虑；

具体工作详情:

  1. 具体工作详情:
    1. 非诉讼业务 Non - litigation Business
    2. 合同起草与审查 Contract Drafting and Review
    3. 项目法律事务处理 Handling of Project Legal Affairs
    4. 知识产权事务 Intellectual Property Affairs

非诉讼业务 Non - litigation Business

合同起草与审查 Contract Drafting and Review

合同是经济活动中极为关键的法律文件，关乎交易双方的权益与责任。

Contracts are extremely crucial legal documents in economic activities, concerning the rights, interests and responsibilities of both trading parties.

律师在合同起草环节，会依据客户具体需求与交易背景，精准把控合同架构与条款。

When drafting contracts, lawyers will accurately control the contract structure and terms according to the specific needs of clients and the transaction background.

首先，明确合同主体信息，确保主体资格合法合规，避免因主体瑕疵导致合同无效。

Firstly, clarify the information of the contract parties to ensure the legality and compliance of the subject qualifications and avoid the invalidity of the contract due to subject defects.

接着，详细拟定交易标的条款，清晰界定货物规格、服务内容等，防止模糊不清引发纠纷。

Then, carefully draw up the terms of the subject matter of the transaction, clearly define the specifications of goods, service content, etc., to prevent disputes caused by ambiguity.

在价款支付条款上，规定支付方式、时间节点与违约责任，保障客户资金安全与交易顺利推进。

In the payment terms, stipulate the payment method, time nodes and liability for breach of contract to ensure the safety of clients' funds and the smooth progress of the transaction.

例如，在大型设备采购合同起草中，律师不仅要明确设备型号、质量标准，还需对交付时间、安装调试责任以及质保期等关键环节细致规定。

For example, when drafting a large - scale equipment procurement contract, lawyers not only need to clarify the equipment model and quality standards, but also need to carefully stipulate key links such as the delivery time, installation and commissioning responsibilities, and the quality guarantee period.

合同审查时，律师会从法律合规性、风险防控与商业合理性多维度考量。

When reviewing contracts, lawyers will consider from multiple dimensions such as legal compliance, risk prevention and control, and business rationality.

检查合同是否符合现行法律法规，杜绝违法条款。

Check whether the contract complies with current laws and regulations and eliminate illegal clauses.

针对潜在风险点，如不可抗力条款是否完备、争议解决方式是否有利等进行排查与修正。

Investigate and correct potential risk points, such as whether the force majeure clause is complete and whether the dispute resolution method is advantageous.

同时，从商业角度审视合同条款是否契合客户经营策略与利益诉求。

At the same time, examine from a business perspective whether the contract terms are in line with the client's business strategy and interest demands.

以常见的租赁合同审查为例，律师会关注租金递增方式、房屋维修责任划分、转租限制等条款，为客户规避风险并争取最大利益。

Taking the review of a common lease contract as an example, lawyers will pay attention to clauses such as the rent increase method, the division of house maintenance responsibilities, and sub - lease restrictions to avoid risks for clients and strive for maximum benefits.

项目法律事务处理 Handling of Project Legal Affairs

在企业并购项目里，律师首先开展法律尽职调查。

In enterprise merger and acquisition projects, lawyers first carry out legal due diligence.

全面梳理目标企业的股权结构，核查股权是否存在质押、代持纠纷等问题，确保收购方取得清晰股权。

Comprehensively sort out the equity structure of the target enterprise, check whether there are problems such as equity pledge and nominee shareholding disputes, and ensure that the acquirer obtains clear equity.

对目标企业的资产状况进行深入审查，包括固定资产产权明晰度、无形资产权属完整性等，防止资产瑕疵带来损失。

Conduct an in - depth review of the asset status of the target enterprise, including the clarity of fixed - asset property rights and the integrity of intangible - asset ownership, to prevent losses caused by asset defects.

同时，排查目标企业的债权债务关系，揭示潜在债务风险。

At the same time, investigate the creditor - debtor relationship of the target enterprise to reveal potential debt risks.

在调查基础上，律师出具详细法律意见书，为收购方决策提供关键依据。

Based on the investigation, lawyers issue detailed legal opinions to provide key bases for the decision - making of the acquirer.

之后，参与并购协议起草与谈判，在交易价格、支付方式、业绩对赌等核心条款上为客户据理力争，保障并购交易合法、公平且符合客户商业预期。

After that, participate in the drafting and negotiation of the merger and acquisition agreement, and strive for the client on core clauses such as the transaction price, payment method, and performance gambling to ensure that the merger and acquisition transaction is legal, fair, and in line with the client's business expectations.

企业上市项目中，律师工作贯穿始终。

In enterprise listing projects, lawyers' work runs through the whole process.

在前期筹备阶段，协助企业梳理历史沿革，规范股权架构，确保企业符合上市主体资格要求。

In the early preparation stage, assist the enterprise in sorting out its historical evolution and standardizing its equity structure to ensure that the enterprise meets the requirements for the listing subject qualification.

进行全面法律尽职调查，涵盖企业业务合规性、关联交易合法性、税务合规等多方面。

Carry out a comprehensive legal due diligence, covering aspects such as the compliance of the enterprise's business, the legality of related - party transactions, and tax compliance.

在上市申报阶段，起草招股说明书中的法律部分，准确披露企业法律风险与合规情况。

In the listing application stage, draft the legal part of the prospectus and accurately disclose the enterprise's legal risks and compliance status.

同时，与监管机构沟通协调，解答法律疑问，确保上市进程顺利推进。

At the same time, communicate and coordinate with regulatory authorities, answer legal questions, and ensure the smooth progress of the listing process.

知识产权事务 Intellectual Property Affairs

商标注册方面，律师协助企业进行商标查询，分析商标注册可行性，避免因与他人在先商标近似而被驳回。

In terms of trademark registration, lawyers assist enterprises in trademark searches, analyze the feasibility of trademark registration, and avoid rejection due to similarity to others' prior trademarks.

指导企业设计具有显著性与辨识度的商标，提高注册成功率。

Guide enterprises to design trademarks with distinctiveness and recognition to improve the registration success rate.

在商标注册申请过程中，准确填写申请文件，跟进审核进度，及时应对商标局的审查意见。

During the trademark registration application process, accurately fill in the application documents, follow up the review progress, and timely respond to the review opinions of the Trademark Office.

若遭遇商标异议，律师会运用专业知识，为企业进行异议答辩，维护商标注册权益。

If a trademark opposition is encountered, lawyers will use professional knowledge to defend the enterprise against the opposition and safeguard the trademark registration rights and interests.

例如，某新兴互联网企业计划推出新品牌，律师通过细致商标查询与分析，帮助企业调整商标设计，成功完成商标注册，为企业品牌发展奠定基础。

For example, when an emerging Internet enterprise plans to launch a new brand, lawyers help the enterprise adjust the trademark design through careful trademark searches and analysis, and successfully complete the trademark registration, laying a foundation for the development of the enterprise's brand.

专利申请时，律师与企业技术团队紧密合作，深入了解发明创造核心技术方案，精准提炼专利申请要点。

When applying for a patent, lawyers work closely with the enterprise's technical team, deeply understand the core technical solutions of the invention and creation, and accurately refine the key points of the patent application.

撰写高质量专利申请书，清晰阐述发明创造的新颖性、创造性与实用性，提高专利授权概率。

Write high - quality patent applications, clearly expound the novelty, creativity and practicality of the invention and creation, and increase the probability of patent authorization.

在专利审查过程中，与专利审查员沟通交流，积极答复审查意见。

During the patent review process, communicate with patent examiners and actively respond to review opinions.

若涉及专利侵权纠纷，律师会收集侵权证据，评估侵权风险，通过协商、行政投诉或诉讼等方式，坚决维护企业专利权。

If a patent infringement dispute is involved, lawyers will collect infringement evidence, assess infringement risks, and firmly safeguard the enterprise's patent rights through negotiation, administrative complaints or litigation.

著作权登记工作中，律师指导企业及时对各类作品进行著作权登记，明确作品权属。

In the copyright registration work, lawyers guide enterprises to register the copyright of various works in a timely manner to clarify the ownership of the works.

在著作权侵权纠纷处理上，无论是企业自身作品被侵权，还是面临侵权指控，律师都能凭借专业法律知识，通过调解、仲裁或诉讼途径妥善解决纠纷，保障企业著作权相关合法权益。

In handling copyright infringement disputes, whether the enterprise's own works are infringed or it faces infringement accusations, lawyers can, with professional legal knowledge, properly resolve disputes through mediation, arbitration or litigation to protect the enterprise's legitimate rights and interests related to copyright.
